zh.lifeSummary: Euphemia-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, relic of Mackintosh, latterly of Innes是Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat和Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat的女兒，出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾。她於大約1380年與Lachlan MacKintosh 8th of Mackintosh, Captain of Clan Chattan在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1441年在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Euphemia-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, relic of Mackintosh, latterly of Innes是Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat和Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat的女儿，出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾。她于大约1380年与Lachlan MacKintosh 8th of Mackintosh, Captain of Clan Chattan在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1441年在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Fraser
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: apparently a nickname from Anglo-Norman French fraser(e), fresere ‘strawberry plant’. Fresel and Frisel, from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, are early variants of the Fraser surname, the modern Gaelicized form of which is Friseal. See Frizzell . The crest on the Scottish family's coat of arms takes the form of a strawberry plant, but its antiquity is unknown. Claims of a habitational derivation, in particular from a place called la Frézelière in Anjou (France), are attractive but they lack verifiable evidence.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

History: There are two clans Fraser in Scotland, with common ancestry going back to Simon Fraser of Keith in East Lothian, who lived in the 12th century. One of these clans has its seat at Philorth Castle (subsequently re-named Cairnbulg) on the northeast coast of Scotland. Sir Alexander Fraser, 8th laird of Philorth (c. 1536–1623) converted the fishing village of Faithlie into the burgh of Fraserburgh in the 1590s. The other clan is Fraser of Lovat, associated mainly with the city of Inverness are. They are descended from Simon Fraser, a younger son, who lived in the early 14th century. In Gaelic, the head of Clan Fraser of Lovat is known as Mac Shimi ‘son of Simon’.

variants.name: Frayser
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frazer
meanings: Variant of   Fraser  , associated chiefly with northern Ireland.

variants.name: Frashier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frizzell
meanings: English and Irish: nickname from Old French fresel, frisel ‘lace, ribbon, braid, brooch, frill, ruff’, for someone with an ornate style of dress, or ‘object of little value’ (a diminutive of frese, of ancient Germanic origin).
Scottish: from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, an alternative form of Fraser .

variants.name: Frazier
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasher
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .
Possibly an altered form of German Fratzscher (see Frutchey ).

en.lifeSummary: Euphemia-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, relic of Mackintosh, latterly of Innes was born in Inverness-shire, Scotland as the daughter of Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat and Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat. She married Lachlan MacKintosh 8th of Mackintosh, Captain of Clan Chattan about 1380, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1441, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Euphemia-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, relic of Mackintosh, latterly of Innes est née à Inverness-shire, Écosse, fille de Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat et Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat. Elle a épousé Lachlan MacKintosh 8th of Mackintosh, Captain of Clan Chattan environ 1380, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1441, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Euphemia-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, relic of Mackintosh, latterly of Innes wurde in Inverness-shire, Scotland, als Tochter von Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat und Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat geboren. Sie hat um 1380 in Scotland Lachlan MacKintosh 8th of Mackintosh, Captain of Clan Chattan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1441 in Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Euphemia-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, relic of Mackintosh, latterly of Innes è nata il nel Inverness-shire, Scotland come figlia di Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat e Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat. Lei sposato Lachlan MacKintosh 8th of Mackintosh, Captain of Clan Chattan circa 1380, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1441, nel Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Euphemia-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, relic of Mackintosh, latterly of Innesはスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアでHugh Fraser 4th of LovatとIsabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovatの娘として生まれた。約1380年にスコットランドでLachlan MacKintosh 8th of Mackintosh, Captain of Clan Chattanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1441年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Euphemia-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, relic of Mackintosh, latterly of Innes(은)는 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에서 Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat(와)과 Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1380년 스컷랜드에서 Lachlan MacKintosh 8th of Mackintosh, Captain of Clan Chattan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1441년 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Euphemia-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, relic of Mackintosh, latterly of Innes nasceu em Inverness-shire, Scotland filha de Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat e Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat. Ela casou-se com Lachlan MacKintosh 8th of Mackintosh, Captain of Clan Chattan aproximadamente 1380, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1441, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Euphemia-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, relic of Mackintosh, latterly of Innes родилась в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия. Её родителей звали Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat и Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lachlan MacKintosh 8th of Mackintosh, Captain of Clan Chattan около 1380 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1441 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Euphemia-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, relic of Mackintosh, latterly of Innes nació en Inverness-shire, Scotland como hija de Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat y Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat. Se casó con Lachlan MacKintosh 8th of Mackintosh, Captain of Clan Chattan aproximadamente 1380, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1441, en Aberdeenshire, Scotland.
